address: Heaton Park Road, Newcastle upon Tyne, NE6 5NR
lead_profile_text: 2-bed flat in Heaton, Newcastle (NE6 5NR). LTL at £900/month for 5 years; tenant has vacated. Renovation in progress (painting and tiling); completion mid-July to early August 2026. Built-in furniture (cabinets, cupboards) and dining table already in place; beds still needed. Can sleep 6 guests without HMO licence. Partner not yet consulted (currently away). Actively comparing quotes from Pass the Keys. Primary concerns: income consistency and not being kept informed about guest activity.
emotional_profile: Reassurance-seeking. Concerned about income consistency and transparency around guest activity. Needs partner alignment before committing. Not looking for hands-off validation — needs confidence that income will be reliable and she will be kept informed.
delay_types: renovation not complete (mid-July to early August 2026)
delay_trigger_phrases: not being kept informed about guests
delay_timeline: Mid-July to early August 2026 (renovation completion); partner return gates the decision
green_light_types: net income figures resonated (double LTL at £900/month)
Slack channel communication model directly addressed 'not being informed' concern
monthly statements and quarterly review call structure
6-guest capacity without HMO highlighted as asset she hadn't considered
green_light_trigger_phrases: not being kept informed about guests

top_objections.text: Will it actually be £24,150 every year? (income consistency concern)
top_objections.zac_response: Monthly statements, quarterly performance calls, and seasonal projections showing range shared

top_objections.text: Actively comparing with Pass the Keys — getting their quote
top_objections.zac_response: Service model differentiation discussed; direct comparison document not yet sent

top_objections.text: Partner not available — joint decision required
top_objections.zac_response: Follow-up ~July 1st agreed; Zac to send meeting summary and agreement

top_objections.text: Uncertainty about renovation completion date (mid-July to early August)
top_objections.zac_response: Timeline acknowledged; follow-up gated to near-completion date

top_questions.text: Will income actually be consistent at £24,150/year?
top_questions.answer: Seasonal variation explained: peak April–July, weakest October and January; monthly statements track performance; quarterly calls review trends against projections

top_questions.text: How will I be kept informed about what's happening with guests?
top_questions.answer: Dedicated Slack channel for instant communication; monthly payout statements with detailed breakdowns; maintenance reports when applicable

what_moved_them: Net income figures — approximately double LTL at £900/month (£2,012 vs £900)
Slack channel communication model — directly addressed 'not being kept informed' as her biggest stated worry
Monthly statements and quarterly performance review call structure
Can accommodate 6 guests without HMO licence — an asset she hadn't previously considered

conversion_gaps.gap: Partner not on the call — partner's return is the key decision gate
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send Sunjana a Stayful vs Pass the Keys comparison document she can share with partner; frame around income consistency and communication transparency as her two stated concerns

conversion_gaps.gap: Pass the Keys actively quoting — competitive risk during interim wait period
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Do not chase before ~July 1st (premature follow-up risks irritating her); let renovation completion create natural re-engagement window; every week of delay is ~£1,100 of foregone August peak income

conversion_gaps.gap: Income consistency concern not fully resolved
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send historical performance data for comparable Newcastle properties alongside the follow-up; reference quarterly review call structure

offer_framing: No special offer — standard 15%+VAT rate. August live date creates seasonal urgency (~£1,100/week of foregone peak income per week of delay after renovation completion).
zac_income_intro: £46,700 gross / £24,150 net per year (£2,012/month) — approximately double LTL income. Peak months April–July; weakest October and January. Utilities ~£5,000/year. Additional £3,000–5,000 annual profit after utilities.
zac_reassurance_phrases: dedicated Slack channel — instant communication for owners
can sleep 6 guests without HMO licence requirements
